subject: Roggenrola, a small round blue-grey rock Pokemon with a prominent hexagonal yellow cavity on its front face, set in a rocky cave or stone terrain
description: A small, nearly spherical rock creature sits on dusty rocky ground, with cave walls or boulders visible in the background. The body is blue-grey, textured to suggest stone. Its most distinctive feature is a large hexagonal cavity on its front — yellow-orange inside, like an ear or sensory organ. No visible limbs or eyes. The setting is clearly underground or in a rocky ravine, with warm brown-tan tones in the background contrasting the cool blue-grey of the creature. The composition is a close mid-shot centered on the small Pokemon.
foreground: Small spherical rock creature with hexagonal yellow cavity on its front
background: Rocky cave or ravine terrain with boulders and dusty earth
emotion: neutral, inert — no visible expression or posture cues
